summary: Reworked cube lattice to break visual uniformity: added seeded vertex jitter (bounded at 0.35*cellSize), noise-driven cell voiding with edge-cell adjacency filtering and vertex compaction, connectivity tracking per vertex. Removed treble micro displacement from both vertex shaders, gated slow modulation behind bass smoothstep, reduced bass drift coefficient from 0.25 to 0.15. Added aConnectivity attribute to vertex dots for connectivity-driven point size boost and alpha emphasis. Increased uBasePointSize from 0.04 to 0.06. Added latticeVoidDensity and latticeJitter to quality profiles with tier-appropriate values. Threaded seed through to generator. All 37 new tests pass, build succeeds.
